notes: Several captures restate the same retention rule with minor wording changes.
The scorer should reward grouping all near-duplicates into one durable knowledge cluster.

captures.preview: Clipboard history should retain 90 days and survive upgrades.
captures.rawText: Clipboard history should retain 90 days and survive upgrades.

captures.preview: Clipboard history needs to survive app upgrades for the full 90-day window.
captures.rawText: Clipboard history needs to survive app upgrades for the full 90-day window.

captures.preview: Retention data is a durable user asset, not disposable cache.
captures.rawText: Retention data is a durable user asset, not disposable cache.

captures.preview: Do not tie clipboard history lifetime to bundle reinstall.
captures.rawText: Do not tie clipboard history lifetime to bundle reinstall. App upgrades and re-installs should not silently erase retained captures.

captures.preview: Clipboard retention is a durable asset, not just temporary app cache.
captures.rawText: Clipboard retention is a durable asset, not just temporary app cache.

captures.preview: Preview and production channels can differ, but retention semantics should not.
captures.rawText: Preview and production channels can differ, but retention semantics should not. The user's retained history is still the same long-lived asset.
